summary: Comprehensive testing of VidTrack platform new features: i18n (EN/ES language system), CPM payment system, and published date functionality. All backend APIs tested successfully (20/20 passed). Frontend UI testing completed with language toggles, dashboard functionality, video management, and admin CPM system all working correctly.
passed_tests: Language toggle on auth page switches between EN/ES correctly
Language toggle in sidebar works and dashboard labels translate
Creator login successful and dashboard loads with translated labels
Add Video dialog shows published date field and accepts date input
TikTok video with current date shows countdown ('X days left')
Instagram video with old date shows 'Pending payment' badge
Admin login successful and dashboard loads with translated stats
Admin creators page shows CPM column with dollar icon buttons
CPM dialog opens when clicking dollar button, accepts values and saves
Creator detail page shows CPM setting panel with current value
Total Payout and Pending Payout cards calculate correctly (showing $0.00)
Video cards in admin view show payment amounts based on CPM
Admin can mark videos as 'Paid' from dropdown menu (green badge appears)
Admin can mark paid videos back to 'Pending' from dropdown menu
Backend PUT /api/admin/creators/{id}/cpm endpoint works (tested via API)
Backend PUT /api/admin/videos/{id}/payment endpoint works (tested via API)
Backend POST /api/videos accepts published_date field (tested via API)
